title: DISCOVERY 3 — Eva joins to look
prompt: Medium shot in @kitchen by the window. @Sara on the LEFT still points at the window, holding @ipad in her other hand. @Eva on the RIGHT stops beside her sister, hands on her cheeks in shocked surprise, eyes huge. Eva (gasping): "What is going on?!" Sara (eyes locked on the window): "You have to see this!" Cheerful surprised mood, warm daylight from the window.
